commit.message:
Tighten cleanup invariants in codegen_statement

- remove duplicated forward declarations for statement-list and annotation
  helpers in `src/codegen_statement.c`
- simplify `SCOPE_CLEANUP_FINALLY` unwinding by enforcing the existing
  non-null `finally_block` invariant
- drop the unused `finally_body` field from `struct finally_scope_cleanup`
  and its initializer

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Refactor statement codegen context and annotation setup

- move statement codegen away from threaded context parameters and simplify
  statement-list emission helpers
- remove unused `cg_state.current_function` state and collapse its remaining
  call-site scaffolding
- remove delayed `setup_annotations` state and emit `SETUP_ANNOTATIONS`
  eagerly for non-function statement lists based on scope analysis
- extract shared non-function body preamble (`annotations` + `__doc__`) and
  reuse it in module/class emission paths
- inline small single-use helpers (`emit_module_begin`/`emit_module_end` and
  function-closure setup in `emit_def`) to reduce indirection

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

feat: implement Phase 1 - Foundation & Error Collection

## Requirements Implemented

- INT-01: OpenClaw Plugin skeleton with manifest
- INT-02: Reuse .learnings/ directory structure
- INT-03: CLI command entry point (openclaw forcefield)
- ERR-01: Tool call failure detection (tool_result_persist hook)
- ERR-02: User correction detection (agent_end hook)
- ERR-03: Error context collection
- ERR-04: Error writing to .learnings/ERRORS.md
- ERR-05: CLI manual error addition

## Files Added

- src/index.ts - Plugin entry point
- src/cli.ts - CLI commands
- src/hooks/toolResultPersist.ts - Tool failure detection
- src/hooks/agentEnd.ts - User correction detection
- src/storage/errorWriter.ts - Error persistence
- src/storage/errorReader.ts - Error retrieval
- src/commands/errorAdd.ts - Manual error addition
- src/commands/errorList.ts - List errors
- src/types/error.ts - Error types
- src/types/rule.ts - Rule types
- tests/unit/*.test.ts - Unit tests
- tests/e2e/cli.flow.test.ts - E2E tests

## Test Results

- 5 tests passing
- Type check passing

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

Add transcript-style regression fixtures for dispatch watch boundary patterns and replay them in AC-13/AC-14 tests to lock formatting semantics across adapter chunking variants.

- npm run test:shard3

commit.message:
feat(session-log): add --text replay for session log show

Add a --text flag to session log show to replay assistant output from session.update content blocks. The replay path resolves blob pointers before extraction and supports both content arrays and chunk-style content objects.

Also adds integration coverage for AC @session-log-show ac-11 and verifies --json --text --events coexistence.

commit.message:
fix(skill): add metadata header for Codex skill installation

Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

fix(homey-pairing): remove unsupported API zone fallback

Stop calling Homey manager API for zone lookup during pairing. In app runtime this path requires a user session and fails with 'Missing Session'.

Node pairing now only uses manager zones when available and otherwise gracefully falls back to location-based naming without zone matching.

Also removes the temporary homey:manager:api permission and updates harness tests accordingly.

Validation: npm --prefix co.lazylabs.zwavejs2homey run test; homey app validate.

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: zwavejs2homey
repository.description: Homey Z-Wave JS Bridge

commit.message:
Reject `**` in starred-expression rejection paths

- extend `reject_starred_expression()` to reject `AST_UNEXPR_STAR_STAR`
  alongside `AST_UNEXPR_STAR`
- prevent invalid call-argument generator forms like `**x for x in y`
  from reaching codegen and triggering an internal compiler error
- add an error regression test for `value(**x for x in b)` and its
  expected diagnostic output

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: PyComparse

commit.message:
fix(homey-pairing): bind manager methods for zone lookup

Fix NodeDriver zone discovery regression by binding Homey manager methods before invocation. This prevents lost context when calling manager APIs like homey.api.get and zones.getZones during pairing.

Adds harness coverage to ensure API fallback is invoked with correct method context.

Validation: npm --prefix co.lazylabs.zwavejs2homey run test; homey app validate.

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: zwavejs2homey
repository.description: Homey Z-Wave JS Bridge

commit.message:
feat(compiler+homey): sanitize generated JSON paths and harden pairing zone lookup

Compiler/build tooling now sanitizes repo-local absolute paths to repo-relative paths before writing artifacts and summaries. Added a shared repo path sanitization helper and a regression test that scans repo JSON files for machine-specific absolute paths.

Bundled compiled artifact generation is wired into build scripts with validation tests, and committed artifacts were regenerated in sanitized form (compiled profiles + homey authoring vocabulary).

Node pairing now falls back to Homey Manager API zone lookup when zone manager data is unavailable, and app permissions were updated accordingly so location-based zone matching works reliably in pairing.

Validation: npm run test -w @zwavejs2homey/core; npm --prefix co.lazylabs.zwavejs2homey run test; homey app validate.

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: zwavejs2homey
repository.description: Homey Z-Wave JS Bridge

feat(task): add --description support to task set

Expose --description on task set for single-ref and --refs batch updates.
Supports clearing with --description null and whitespace-only values.
Adds integration coverage for update/clear and batch updates.

Task: @01KJS6ZXW9ADK2PQPQXEX43MF4
Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

feat(webui): 支持 workspace 文件读写并接入任务执行控制

- 新增 workspace content 读写 API 封装与类型定义
- TaskWorkspaceEditor 支持重载/保存、未保存状态提示与 ETag(if_match) 校验
- 任务详情页“开始/终止/停止 Deep Research”改为调用 execute/research 接口；workspace_path 未生成时禁用工作区/日志
- 任务列表页精简操作入口，执行/研究/workspace/日志收敛到详情页
- 更新 CHANGELOG（未记录文件移除项）

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

feat(homey-pairing): use node location hints and singular bridge flow

Node pairing now consults Homey zone names and uses Z-Wave node location as a naming hint. When a node location does not map to a known Homey zone, the pair label becomes '<name> - <location>' without the node-id prefix. When neither name nor location exists, pairing falls back to the node id.

Bridge pairing list_devices is configured with singular mode so the flow advances cleanly to add_devices for the singleton bridge device.

Adds coverage for location-driven naming, zone match behavior, and bridge singular pair-flow metadata.

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(oauth): harden refresh locking under concurrent token refreshes (#823)

Fix OAuth refresh-token race handling in Cloudflare worker token
exchange by tightening lock ownership semantics and contention handling.
Also stop tracking `agents.lock` now that it is gitignored.

- Make refresh lock IDs collision-resistant to avoid same-timestamp lock
identity collisions.
- Add owner-checked lock release so a stale worker cannot delete a newer
lock holder.
- Strengthen lock-contention flow with bounded polling + cache re-checks
before upstream refresh.
- Add/adjust regression coverage for contention and lock-ownership
cleanup behavior.
- Remove tracked `agents.lock` and ignore it in `.gitignore`.

---------

Co-authored-by: GPT-5 Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat(gods): registry, co-authors script, settings patcher, routing consolidation

Single source of truth for god model/routing/co-author info:
- config/gods-registry.json: model_id, provider, exec_mode, routing, co_author_line per god
- scripts/co-authors.sh: symlink-safe, outputs Co-Authored-By lines from registry
- scripts/setup.sh: wires ~/.local/bin/co-authors symlink for cross-project access
- scripts/patch-settings.sh: idempotent Ledger hook wiring (--local flag supported)

Consolidation:
- scripts/zsh-function-override.zsh: _PANTHEON_GOD_MODELS + _PANTHEON_NATIVE_PINNED_MODELS now hydrated from registry via jq; no more hardcoded per-god entries
- prompts/CORE.md: commit workflow updated to use co-authors.sh; static Co-Authored-By list removed

Co-Authored-By: Hephaestus <codex@openai.com>
Co-Authored-By: Librarian <codex@openai.com>
